大发成功回血—对一导师计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239142207_65564631<br>vk.com/topic-239142186_64451728<br>vk.com/topic-239142259_64900167<br>vk.com/topic-239142231_65776663<br>vk.com/topic-239136421_65776668<br>vk.com/topic-239142250_65185654<br>vk.com/topic-239142196_64451716<br>vk.com/topic-239142181_65776658<br>vk.com/topic-239142246_64451794<br>vk.com/topic-239142248_64624778<br>vk.com/topic-239142188_64624715<br>vk.com/topic-239136373_64294920<br>vk.com/topic-239084240_65185698<br>vk.com/topic-239142202_64738039<br>vk.com/topic-239142210_65185716<br>vk.com/topic-239142190_65185730<br>vk.com/topic-239142195_64036140<br>vk.com/topic-239142176_64451851<br>vk.com/topic-239142198_64624837<br>vk.com/topic-239142177_65564733<br>vk.com/topic-239142199_64900311<br>vk.com/topic-239142183_64294950<br>vk.com/topic-239142184_64123702<br>vk.com/topic-239142187_65564737<br>vk.com/topic-239142215_64036144<br>vk.com/topic-239142178_64624842<br>vk.com/topic-239142223_64294975<br>vk.com/topic-239142191_65776825<br>vk.com/topic-239142260_65185694<br>vk.com/topic-239142206_64451905<br>vk.com/topic-239142239_64900367<br>vk.com/topic-239142244_64123759<br>vk.com/topic-239142240_65185799<br>vk.com
